title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Hajrudin, Unknown person #3, Sanji, Scopper Gaban as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why aren't any of you fighting back?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'You didn't lift a finger!! Now what are we supposed to do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the Marines could not oppose this group.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A crew that hailed from the elusive Isle of Women...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A fierce and stunning pirate band, off-limits to men.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I grow weary of my own beauty.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: day and night, it always goes this way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will I ever be free to shed it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She's unbearably cute!!:) I'm in love!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: empress of amazon lily captain of the kua pirates GLORIONSA (future elder nvon)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her radiance is making my mind go blank!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My heart can't afford to beat this hard!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Empress Gloriosa, here are your new fan letters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What about all those back there?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh, those are for Lady Shaky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There are a hundred times more!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could she?! Upstaging your own captain is a total betrayal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KyaAah!:) Even her angry face is like an icy gem!)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: indeed... the only one said to outshine the radiant Gloriosa; the star of her era,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: was none other than her first mate, Shakuyaku.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
